title: murtughas calyculata
intro: Murtughas calyculata, also known as the "sour fig" or "caper bush," is a type of flowering plant in the family Capparaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and lower blood pressure due to its high content of flavonoids and carotenoids. The health benefits of Murtughas calyculata include its potential to prevent certain types of cancer, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being consumed as a fresh fruit or dried for medicinal purposes.
